description: o1-engineer is a command-line tool designed to assist developers in managing and interacting with their projects efficiently. Leveraging the power of OpenAI's API, this tool provides functionalities such as code generation, file editing, and project planning to streamline your development workflow.

A powerful command-line interface (CLI) tool for LeetCode, enabling developers to fetch coding problems, submit solutions, manage accounts, and streamline competitive programming workflows directly from the terminal.
A command-line interface (CLI) tool for task management and Pomodoro timing. Designed for developer workflow efficiency.
Command-line tool with commands to streamline the developer workflow.

Ragnar is a pure Ruby command-line RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) tool with zero external dependencies. It provides local document indexing, semantic search, and LLM-powered query processing. Built to be hackable, it lets Ruby developers experiment with agentic workflows and RAG pipelines natively in Ruby.
A command line tool for developers to run short, structured self-experiments on their workflow
A lightweight, extensible command-line tool designed to streamline common developer workflows, scaffolding, and automation tasks.

BMO is an extensible command line application that allows a developer to customize and super charge their workflow. Modules that include a framework for allowing a developer to easily spin up microservices, a lightweight dependency injector that allows users to easily test and share code across projects, and project/code generation tools.

This project is a command-line toolkit for SHARC ADSP development on Ubuntu Linux. It's designed for embedded developers, researchers, and "coding agents" who need to automate their workflow without a GUI. The toolkit enables CI/CD and scripting for headless environments, simplifying a complex setup into a single, reproducible process.
Command-line REST API client for developers who prefer terminal workflows over GUI tools
AI tools, automation, developer workflows, command-line utilities, and digital systems shaping modern technical work.

Omnilang: The Smart Localization Tool for Developers 🌍. Automate your project's translation and manage your entire localization workflow from the command line. Get instant, high-quality translations and a powerful CLI to review and correct. Make your open-source project truly global!
DevinciSketch - A command-line tool for PHP developers to automate common tasks and streamline development workflows.

GitWise is a command-line tool designed for experienced developers to enhance their Git workflow with intelligent AI assistance. It focuses on speed, efficiency, and integrating seamlessly with your existing habits, while upholding industry best practices.

`idempiere-cli` is a command-line tool built with Quarkus, designed to modernize the developer experience for iDempiere plugin development. It streamlines the entire workflow — from setting up a development environment to building, testing, and publishing plugins.
A modular command-line utility suite for developers, designed to preprocess, analyze, and package project source files and database schemas for automation and deployment workflows.

CLI 🚀 is a Python command-line tool that helps developers quickly bootstrap FastAPI projects, manage encryption, Docker workflows, requests, and development utilities with best practices and simple interactive commands.

A versatile command-line utility designed to streamline content publishing and management workflows across various platforms. Empowers developers with efficient deployment and organization capabilities for their digital assets.

The oh-action is a GitHub Action that streamlines OpenHarmony development workflows by setting up the necessary development environment. It automatically installs the OpenHarmony SDK and provides essential command-line tools, enabling developers to build, test, and manage their OpenHarmony applications in CI/CD pipelines.

A powerful terminal-based tool for managing product backlogs with YAML storage and rich formatting. Built for developers and product managers who prefer command-line interfaces for their workflow management.
A command-line tool for working with Slack messages, channels, and cross-tool workflows -- designed for developers who live in the terminal.

A command-line interface (CLI) tool designed to generate GitHub Actions workflows for publishing NPM packages. It will support both Model Context Protocol (MCP) agents and traditional CLI usage for developers and non-MCP AI agents.

Autocrat CLI is a modular command-line interface designed for automation and task management. It features plugin-based architecture, workflow generation, and system integration, making it a versatile tool for developers and power users.

A powerful and user-friendly command-line interface (CLI) tool designed for kernel developers, security researchers, and system administrators. This tool simplifies kernel vulnerability analysis, CVE research, and kernel compilation tasks, streamlining workflows and improving productivity.
A Flexible command-line tool for generating and managing GUIDs. Perfect for developers who need to work with GUIDs in their daily workflow.
